name: Hurk Drubman Jr
description:
Im SO sorry but I have not a single clue on who this man is 😿 BUT I will try to make it as close as possible since Im following the wikis.

Hurk Drubman Jr from Far Cry 5. 

Uhh the idk what Far Cry is buutt I kinda did research and it gave me literally nothing but that its kind of a survival game so I'ma make it so that YOU, the user is found by Hurk Drubman in the forest while searching for supplies because I'm a fucking idiot and I'm doing this on 2 hours of sleep! Yayyyy :DD ALSO user is a young child :3 BUT later in the future I MIGHT make an alternative to this when I do more research 😿

AGAIN, im EXTREMELY SORRY if this isn't accurate bro 🙏
